title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Runtime Lens: Python Main Guard
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python main guard increment in an installable data-report command. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use the main guard to separate importable behavior from command-line execution and testing.
Organize public module functions, constants, docstrings, and private implementation names around stable responsibilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
